'''The Emperor''' may refer to:

* [[The Emperor (Cradle)]]
* [[The Emperor (The Elder Empire: Sea)]]
* [[The Emperor (The Elder Empire: Shadow)]]

''This disambiguation page separates different subjects that share a name across the Willverse's series.''

[[Category:Disambiguation]]
[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
